# Features Log

This file tracks nodes and features added by the automated Claude Code agent.

## Format

Each entry should follow this format:
```
## YYYY-MM-DD - Feature/Node Name
- Model ID: `owner/model-name`
- Namespace: `category.subcategory`
- Description: Brief description of what was added
```

---

## Initial Setup - 2025-01-14

Repository configured with Claude Code memory and automated sync workflow.

---

## 2026-01-18 - Featured Models Added

- Model ID: `openai/gpt-image-1.5`
- Namespace: `image.generate`
- Description: OpenAI's latest image generation model with better instruction following and adherence to prompts, 1.3M runs

- Model ID: `black-forest-labs/flux-2-max`
- Namespace: `image.generate`
- Description: Black Forest Labs' highest fidelity image model with superior prompt adherence and editing consistency, 198.8K runs

- Model ID: `google/lyria-2`
- Namespace: `audio.generate`
- Description: Google's music generation model producing 48kHz stereo audio from text prompts, 55.1K runs

---

## 2026-02-21 - New Official Models Added

- Model ID: `xai/grok-imagine-video`
- Namespace: `video.generate`
- Description: xAI's Grok Imagine Video model for generating videos from text prompts, 39.3K runs

- Model ID: `moonshotai/kimi-k2.5`
- Namespace: `text.generate`
- Description: Moonshot AI's latest open model unifying vision, text, thinking/non-thinking modes, and multi-agent execution, 14.9K runs

- Model ID: `elevenlabs/music`
- Namespace: `audio.generate`
- Description: ElevenLabs music generation model for composing songs from prompts or composition plans, 3.9K runs

---

## 2026-02-23 - Latest Featured Models Added

- Model ID: `google/gemini-3.1-pro`
- Namespace: `text.generate`
- Description: Google's most intelligent model with improved reasoning and a new medium thinking level, 2.1K runs

- Model ID: `google/gemini-3-flash`
- Namespace: `text.generate`
- Description: Google's most intelligent model built for speed with frontier intelligence, superior search, and grounding, 221.4K runs

- Model ID: `runwayml/gen-4.5`
- Namespace: `video.generate`
- Description: State-of-the-art video motion quality, prompt adherence and visual fidelity, 1.7K runs

- Model ID: `recraft-ai/recraft-v4`
- Namespace: `image.generate`
- Description: Recraft's latest image generation model with strong prompt accuracy, art-directed composition, and integrated text rendering, 3.8K runs

- Model ID: `qwen/qwen3-tts`
- Namespace: `audio.generate`
- Description: A unified Text-to-Speech model featuring Voice, Clone, and Design modes, 70.2K runs

- Model ID: `black-forest-labs/flux-2-klein-4b`
- Namespace: `image.generate`
- Description: Very fast image generation and editing model with 4-step distillation for sub-second inference, 4.3M runs
